name: Djinn Clang / C / C++
description: clang + clangd + scip-clang (for C, C++, Objective-C, CUDA). scip-clang binary is pulled from GitHub releases.

version.description: clang/LLVM major version. 22 is the current stable (April 2026). Accepts anything apt/apk/dnf package groups support (`20`, `21`, `22`).
